hook.name: StrategyPunkHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that charges a time-decaying fee on swaps (starting at 95% for buys, declining 100 bips per 5 blocks to a 10% floor), collecting fees in ETH via nested pool swaps when needed, routing 80% to a companion StrategyPunk contract and 20% to a fee address. Liquidity operations are gated to the companion StrategyPunk contract.
